notes: Step 2 — MASTER tab Site Reference query spine. New top-level MASTER tab replaces HW REF in the bottom nav (HW REF re-homed to the header overflow menu, reachable via hwMatrix_open). Empty state with single Load Master File CTA. Loaded state: header banner (siteCode · N racks · MM/DD HH:MM) + type-ahead search (debounced 200ms, max 5, alphabetical prefix match, tap-to-fill) + per-cabinet host list sorted by RU ascending with hostname-to-clipboard tap (cyan ok-toast via phantomToast). Replace flow uses a new phantomConfirmAsk helper (reusable, .ppt-* base reused; adds only a destructive-button variant). All new globals reachable from console: _masterQueryState, master_normalize, master_loadFile, master_render, master_onInput, master_onSuggestionTap, master_onHostnameTap, master_onReplaceTap, master_initTab, phantomConfirmAsk. VISIBLE_TAB_INDEX reconciled to DOM ground truth (triage/sop/scan/fiber/master = 0..4). No changes to phantom_parseMaster, PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE, the v1.6.28 boot-restore IIFE, EDP/BOM/deploy_*, Ghost Echo, PIN gating, or showPageSafe routing. SW cache bumped together.
